zh.lifeSummary: 當Catrin ferch Madog於1250年出生在威爾士格拉莫爾根利朗德時，她的父親Madog ap Iorwerth31歲，母親Gwadalus ferch Gruffudd23歲。她和Gronwy Fychan ap Gronwy至少有6個兒子和2個女兒。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Catrin ferch Madog于1250年出生在威尔士格拉莫爾根利朗德时，她的父亲Madog ap Iorwerth31岁，母亲Gwadalus ferch Gruffudd23岁。她和Gronwy Fychan ap Gronwy至少有6个儿子和2个女儿。

nameMeanings.name: Madog
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.

variants.name: Madore
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Armand, Eusebe, Fernand, Lucien, Normand, Adhemar, Adrien, Donat, Elzear, Francois, Gaetan, Gilles.
French Canadian: from a French shortened form of the Spanish personal name Amador, from Latin Amator (from amator ‘lover’), a Christian saint's name. Compare Mador .
In some cases possibly also Breton (Madoré): nickname meaning literally ‘good help’, from Old Breton mat ‘good’ and uuoret ‘help’.

nameMeanings.name: Catrin
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

variants.name: Katherine
meanings: equivalent of   Katherine  , also occasionally used in the English-speaking world.

nameMeanings.name: ferch
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: German: variant of   Ferg  . Compare   Verch  .
Probably also an Americanized form of German Förtsch (see Foertsch ).
Probably also an Americanized form of German Förch (see Foerch ).

variants.name: Ferg
meanings: From the vocabulary word denoting the plant (Old English fearn). Modern use of this word as a given name dates from the 19th century, when it is also recorded occasionally as a boy's name in the United States. In some instances the given name may be a transferred use of the surname derived in the medieval period from the vocabulary word.

en.lifeSummary: When Catrin ferch Madog was born in 1250, in Llangynwyd, Glamorgan, Wales, her father, Madog ap Iorwerth, was 31 and her mother, Gwadalus ferch Gruffudd, was 23. She had at least 6 sons and 2 daughters with Gronwy Fychan ap Gronwy.

de.lifeSummary: Als Catrin ferch Madog 1250 in Llangynwyd, Glamorgan, Wales geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Madog ap Iorwerth 31 und ihre Mutter Gwadalus ferch Gruffudd 23. Sie hatte mit Gronwy Fychan ap Gronwy mindestens 6 Söhne und 2 Töchter.

ja.lifeSummary: Catrin ferch Madogが1250年にウェールズグラモーガンラングインウイドで生まれた時，父Madog ap Iorwerthは31歳，母Gwadalus ferch Gruffuddは23歳であった。彼女はGronwy Fychan ap Gronwyとの間に少なくとも6人の息子と2人の娘をもうけた。

ko.lifeSummary: Catrin ferch Madog(이)가 1250년 웨일스 글램르건 랭이w이드에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Madog ap Iorwerth(은)는 31세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Gwadalus ferch Gruffudd(은)는 23세였다. 그녀는 Gronwy Fychan ap Gronwy(와)과 적어도 여섯 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다.
